task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into the EHR and opened the chart for the specified patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR interface is visible, and the patient dashboard or summary for Patient '[PATIENT_NAME]' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Lisinopril 10mg' medication has been discontinued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's medication list, 'Lisinopril 10mg' has an End Date set to the current date, or is clearly marked as inactive/discontinued.

task_completion.description: Verify the discontinuation reason note was added to the medication record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Discontinued due to side effect' is visible in the comments, notes, or details section of the 'Lisinopril 10mg' medication entry.

task_completion.description: Verify a new allergy has been recorded for the medication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's Allergies list or section contains a new entry for 'Lisinopril'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific reaction is documented for the new allergy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Dry Cough' (or 'Cough') is visible as the reaction, symptom, or note associated with the 'Lisinopril' allergy entry.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the LibreHealth EHR GUI, not terminal windows executing SQL queries, curl commands, or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were made to the correct patient's record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name '[PATIENT_NAME]' should be visible in the patient header or demographic area while the medication and allergy updates are being made.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the completion using a text editor or mock page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must clearly be the LibreHealth EHR system with its standard menus, layout, and styling, rather than a generic text document or manipulated HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in LibreHealth EHR. The agent must discontinue 'Lisinopril 10mg' (an FDA-approved ACE inhibitor) by setting its End Date to today and adding the note 'Discontinued due to side effect'. The agent must also add a new allergy for 'Lisinopril' with the reaction 'Dry Cough' (a well-documented class-effect adverse reaction occurring in 4-35% of patients). Verify all clinical updates are made via the EHR's graphical interface.
